metadata_details.purpose: Parser for Hashicorp Hcp vault logs using the OCSF mapping to normalise events into the AI-SIEM schema.
metadata_details.dependency_summary: Requires ingestion of the original Hashicorp Hcp vault logs.
metadata_details.performance_impact: Minimal – this parser is a placeholder pointing to the upstream definition.
metadata_details.tags: hashicorp, hcp vault, logs, ocsf, parser
metadata_details.author: Joel Mora

analysis.semantic_summary: Parser configuration for HashiCorp Cloud Platform (HCP) Vault logs that processes authentication, access control, and operational events. It handles both audit logs and metrics, with focus on identity and access management activities including token operations, policy enforcement, and request tracking.
optimization_opportunities: Add error handling for malformed JSON
Optimize regex patterns for message extraction
analysis.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: hashicorp_hcp_vault_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Entity Management (3004)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T11:04:58.569426

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local OPERATION_PATTERN = "^[%w_%-]+$"

-- Cached activity ID mappings
local ACTIVITY_IDS = {
    create = 1,
    read = 2, 
    update = 3,
    delete = 4
}

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize output with required OCSF fields
    local output = {
        metadata = {},
        src = {
            ip = {}
        },
        unmapped = {},
        class_uid = 3004,
        class_name = "Entity Management", 
        category_uid = 3,
        category_name = "Identity & Access Management"
    }

    -- Safe nested table access helper
    local function get_nested(t, ...)
        local current = t
        for _, key in ipairs({...}) do
            if type(current) ~= "table" then return nil end
            current = current[key]
        end
        return current
    end

    -- Extract request fields
    local request = record.request
    if type(request) == "table" then
        -- Operation mapping with validation
        local operation = request.operation
        if operation and type(operation) == "string" then
            if operation:match(OPERATION_PATTERN) then
                output.activity_name = operation
                output.activity_id = ACTIVITY_IDS[operation:lower()] or 1
            end
        end

        -- IP address mapping
        local remote_addr = request.remote_address
        if remote_addr and type(remote_addr) == "string" then
            output.src.ip.address = remote_addr
        end

        -- Port mapping 
        local remote_port = request.remote_port
        if remote_port and type(remote_port) == "number" then
            output.src.port = {number = remote_port}
        end

        -- Request ID mapping
        if request.id then
            output.metadata.uida = request.id
        end

        -- Namespace mapping
        if request.namespace then
            output.metadata.namespace = request.namespace
        end

        -- Path mapping
        if request.path then
            output.unmapped.path = request.path
        end
    end

    -- Extract auth fields
    local auth = record.auth
    if type(auth) == "table" then
        -- Role mapping
        local role = get_nested(auth, "metadata", "role")
        if role then
            output.metadata.role = role
        end

        -- Token mapping
        if auth.client_token then
            output.unmapped.client_token = auth.client_token
        end

        -- Other auth fields
        if auth.accessor then output.unmapped.accessor = auth.accessor end
        if auth.display_name then output.unmapped.display_name = auth.display_name end
        if auth.policies then output.unmapped.policies = auth.policies end
        if auth.policy_results then output.unmapped.policy_results = auth.policy_results end
    end

    -- Add timestamp if missing
    if not output.time then
        output.time = os.time() * 1000
    end

    -- Validate required fields
    if not output.activity_name then
        return nil, "Missing required field: activity_name"
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handler wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local status, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not status then
        return nil, string.format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end

deployment_notes.monitoring_setup: Enable performance metrics via Observo Dashboard

monitoring_recommendations: Monitor transform() error rate - alert if >1%
Monitor memory usage - should be stable
